---
title: "Hi! I'm Kah Seng :)"
subtitle: "Here's a quick rundown of who I am:"
format:
    html: 
      toc: false
      code-copy: false
      code-annotations: below
reference-location: margin
citation-location: margin
---

-   **Software Engineer** at Duke-NUS.
-   Penultimate undergraduate pursuing B.Sc in **Data Science & Analytics** (Minor in **Computer Science** and Theatre Studies) at NUS.
-   My interests lie in **Software Design & Architecture**, **Data Science** and **Cats**.
-   **Core Maintainer** and **Developer** at [dabestr](https://github.com/ACCLAB/dabestr/tree/master).

::: column-margin
![Figure 1: My face](assets/profile.jpg)
:::

``` {.txt filename="short_resume.txt"}
-- Languages
* High Proficiency   : Python, R, JavaScript
* Medium Proficiency : Java, Lua

-- Frameworks/Technologies
* React.js, Flask, Node.js, Express.js, Next.js, Django

-- Work Experience
* Duke-NUS | Software Engineer | May 2023 - present 
```

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
You may obtain a copy of my official (one-page) resume [here](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1pT7qB7XQmc-EZctvEe1NHxH9xTsFOsCo/view?usp=share_link).
:::
